g.text: Instant overlay compositing over the web view (pre-cached pushed snapshot)
Overlay opens — menu / context-menu / dialog / palette
INSTANT synchronous swap — the frozen page shows
under the overlay; no capture on this path, no flash,
never blank (a dialog dims it via its backdrop).
Cold start (no push yet): freeze! pulls main's cache
via the vv:http-snapshot invoke, then hides.
